headline: GCC And CCS+ Initiative To Advance High-Integrity Carbon Capture & Removal
_date_note: Date confirmed from multiple search-result snippets attributing Carbon Herald coverage to July 13, 2026. MoU signed at IETA Asia Climate Summit 2026 (July 7-9, Hong Kong); Carbon Herald picked it up July 13. Non-Western angle: GCC is a Qatar-based standard; CCS+ is multi-stakeholder. Agreement covers DAC, CO2 transport, BECCS, and point-source industrial capture.

headline: Fugro to support UK carbon capture infrastructure development
_date_note: Date July 13, 2026 confirmed from URL slug '13-07-2026'. Ground Engineering reporting on Fugro/Saipem contract for Northern Endurance Partnership (bp-Equinor-TotalEnergies JV) offshore CO2 pipeline survey, North Sea.

headline: Fugro to support UK carbon capture infrastructure development
_date_note: Date July 9, 2026 confirmed from URL path /2026/07/09/. Earliest traceable publication of Fugro/NEP story.

headline: Fugro to assist Saipem with pipeline work at UK's first offshore CCS project
_date_note: Date July 9, 2026 confirmed via search. Offshore Energy coverage of same Fugro/Saipem/NEP story.

headline: Fugro wins Saipem contract on UK carbon storage project
_date_note: 403 on fetch; no date in URL slug; coverage circulated July 9-13; cannot confirm publication date is in-window.

headline: Saipem contract set to initiate offshore survey on UK's first carbon storage project
_date_note: 403 on fetch; no date in URL slug; Riviera Maritime coverage of Fugro/NEP contract; date unconfirmed.

headline: Global Carbon Council and CCS+ Initiative sign MoU to advance high-integrity CCS and CDR methodologies
_date_note: Primary press release dated July 9, 2026 (last day of IETA Asia Climate Summit). Page returned 403; date confirmed from search snippet 'press releases dated July 9, 2026'.

headline: Global Carbon Council and CCS+ Sign CCS & CDR MoU
_date_note: GCC website announcement dated July 9, 2026; 403 on fetch; date from search.

headline: China issues action plan for carbon peaking during 15th Five-Year Plan period
_date_note: Date July 9, 2026 confirmed from URL path 20260709. Xinhua coverage of China's carbon peaking action plan 2026-2030 (15th Five-Year Plan). CCS is a component technology in the plan.

headline: State Council unveils carbon peak pathway
_date_note: Date July 10, 2026 from URL path 0710. People's Daily English covering China State Council's carbon peaking and carbon neutrality plans under 15th Five-Year Plan.

headline: China issues three-year action plan to accelerate energy sector carbon reduction
_date_note: Date July 11, 2026 from URL path 0711. People's Daily English. National Energy Administration three-year plan; includes building zero-carbon coal and oil areas and supporting CCS deployment.

headline: Eni CCUS Holding expands the financing sources for its platform of CCS projects
_date_note: Date May 2026 from URL path; exact day not confirmed. Eni CCUS Holding / GIP-BlackRock financing expansion following Liverpool Bay CCS (HyNet) project financing success.

headline: Proposal for environmental impact assessment programme for Wisting submitted for public consultation
_date_note: Date June 25, 2026 from URL slug. Equinor/Aker BP/Petoro/INPEX Idemitsu Wisting project EIA. Partnership includes INPEX (10%). CCS is being assessed as part of the field development.

headline: Sumitomo Corporation to Participate in CDR Project Through Joint Venture with Graphyte
_date_note: Date June 3, 2026 confirmed from search. Sumitomo (49%) + Graphyte (51%) JV for biomass Carbon Casting CDR in the US (Loblolly project, Arkansas; rice hulls; 50,000 tCO2/yr scale-up). 403 on direct fetch.

headline: Deep Sky Announces Direct Air Capture Carbon Removal Agreement with TD Bank Group, Advancing Canada's Leadership in Carbon Removal
_date_note: Date June 4, 2026 confirmed from BNN Bloomberg coverage and search snippets. 10-year DAC offtake, 18,000+ credits; 403 on direct fetch.

headline: TerraSpark Energy Campus Wins $18.5M DOE Grant for West Virginia Power and Carbon Capture Project
_date_note: Date June 5, 2026 from URL path. DOE $18.5M for Mantel Capture technology at 1.6 GW coal plant in West Virginia. One of four selections under DOE Coal Recommissioning programme.

headline: Storage permit issued for Prinos CO2
_date_note: Date February 26, 2026 confirmed from multiple search results. HEREMA (Greece) issued 25-year CO2 storage permit for Prinos CO2 project to EnEarth Greece (Energean subsidiary). First CO2 storage permit in Southern Europe.

headline: ONGC Launches First CCS Pilot At Gujarat's Gandhar Oilfield
_date_note: Date approximately early January 2026 per search (exact day not confirmed; used 2026-01-01 as placeholder). India's first full-scale CCS pilot: ~100 tCO2/day injected into depleted wells at Gandhar field, Gujarat; CO2 sourced from Dahej industrial area and Hazira plant.

headline: Air Liquide starting a CO2 capture pilot unit dedicated to the decarbonization of cement industry
_date_note: Date June 10, 2026 confirmed from URL path. Cryocap™ technology pilot (3,000 Nm3/h) at Holcim CaptureLab; first industrial-scale CCS pilot for cement sector.

headline: Class VI well approvals accelerate as CCS permit applications slow
_date_note: Date June 3, 2026 from URL path. Three final Class VI permits issued in Q1-Q2 2026 (matching all of 2025); Texas Railroad Commission received Class VI primacy Dec 2025; 5 projects actively injecting ~5.2 Mtpa.

headline: BKV begins operations at two new CCS sites in Texas
_date_note: Date July 1, 2026 per search. BKV Eagle Ford (South Texas) and Cotton Cove (Fort Worth Basin) facilities operational; ~120,000 tCO2/yr capacity.

headline: Funding the end: new CCUS Decommissioning Rules
_date_note: SI 2026/632 (Carbon Dioxide T&S Offshore Decommissioning Regulations 2026) came into force July 10, 2026; Energy Voice article date not confirmable (403 on fetch; no date in URL slug); likely July 9-11, all out-of-window.

headline: CCSA EU Conference 2026: Europe's Carbon Capture Debate Moves From Ambition To Execution
_date_note: CCSA EU Conference was June 30, 2026 in Brussels; Carbon Herald article published approximately 1 week later (~July 1-7 per search snippet); all out-of-window.

headline: CCUS Hub Study identifies five Asia-Pacific hub sites and welcomes new consortium partners
_date_note: Date April 2026 from URL path (exact day not confirmed; 2026-04-01 placeholder). Five hub sites: India (×2), Indonesia, Malaysia, Australia. Highly relevant Indonesia/Malaysia regional angle.

headline: Equinor opens the environmental impact assessment for the Wisting project to public consultation
_date_note: Date ~June 25, 2026 (Equinor announcement date per Equinor.com news item slug). Wisting consortium: Equinor 42.5%, Aker BP 27.5%, Petoro 20%, INPEX Idemitsu 10%; CCS being assessed.

headline: Seatrium Signs Letter of Intent with Solvang ASA for CCS Installation and Retrofitting
_date_note: Date June 19, 2025 confirmed from investor PDF URL slug '19Jun25'. Nor-Shipping 2025. Retrofit of full-scale CCS (7 MW) on Solvang VLGCs; first retrofit on Clipper Eris Feb 2025. Relevant to CO2 shipping/liquid CO2 carrier angle.

headline: 'Strong potential' for further storage in flagship carbon capture project
_date_note: NEP C43/30-2 well results announced June 2026 per search. 500m sealing rock above 250m Bunter sandstone BC39 storage site. Date not precisely confirmed (article number 599139 precedes 600429 for the July Fugro story); assigned out-of-window.
